name: compile_max_autotune_no_cudagraphs
description: Use torch.compile(mode='max-autotune-no-cudagraphs') instead of 'max-autotune'. Standard max-autotune enables CUDA graph trees which are 3-5x SLOWER on reductions and large-tensor ops. The no-cudagraphs variant gets Triton autotuning benefits without graph overhead.
when_to_apply: Reductions, large tensor ops (>1GB), any op where standard torch.compile is slower than eager. Especially sum/mean/max/min reductions over a dimension.
